title: Health check in Quadlet file not working
body:
### Issue Description

```bash
cat qbittorrent.container

# qbittorrent.container
[Container]
ContainerName=qbittorrent
Environment=PUID=1000 PGID=1000 TZ=Asia/Shanghai WEBUI_PORT=9999
HealthCmd=curl --fail http://localhost:9999/ || exit 1
HealthInterval=10s
HealthRetries=3
HealthStartPeriod=10s
HealthTimeout=30s
Image=lscr.io/linuxserver/qbittorrent:latest
PublishPort=127.0.0.1:9999:9999
PublishPort=6881:6881
PublishPort=6881:6881/udp
Volume=/data/qbittorrent/config:/config
Volume=/data/qbittorrent/downloads:/downloads

[Service]
Restart=always

pwd
/etc/containers/systemd
```

I have a container with a health check, but when I run the health check I get an error:
```bash
podman healthcheck run qbittorrent
Error: container 7680ef17d34422a93e02afbefcdafaf6d7c6d4278dab76ec9918639a41fcb27c has no defined healthcheck
```

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Generate a Quadlet file from podlet
2. Start this container by systemctl
3. Run health check


### Describe the results you received

Health check not works.

### Describe the results you expected

Podman returns a correct health check result.

comments.body:
I believe it should be

`HealthCmd=CMD-SHELL curl --fail http://localhost:9999/ || exit 1`

> I believe it should be
> 
> `HealthCmd=CMD-SHELL curl --fail http://localhost:9999/ || exit 1`

It works, thank you!
